name: Mexican Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Mixed salad leaves (e.g., Oak Leaf, radicchio, Little Gem), rinsed and drained
6 Inch (15 cm) piece of cucumber, chopped
1 small Green pepper, de-seeded and sliced
3 oz Canned red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad leaves by rinsing and draining them.
2. Chop the cucumber into small pieces.
3. Grate the carrot.
4. Cut the tomatoes and green pepper into bite-sized pieces.
5. Drain the canned kidney beans.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the yogurt, tomato puree, mustard, salt, and pepper to make a dressing.
7. Arrange the salad leaves on four serving plates.
8. Top the salad with cucumber, carrot, tomatoes, green pepper, kidney beans, and raisins.
9. Drizzle lime juice over the salad.
10. Spoon the yogurt mixture evenly over the salads.
11. Divide the grated Cheddar cheese among each plate.
12. Serve immediately.
